amendments.reason: ADR-046 + ADR-047 drafts written per owner directive (short form, Path D precedent from PR #1460). Frontmatter populated, status=Proposed; awaiting owner review.

Add .sentrux/rules.toml to scope: raise max_cycles 3 -> 5 to give Phase 3 refactor headroom. Owner authorized on 2026-05-22 chat. Phase 1 PR #1444 (ai_pty self-cycle by design, audit-accepted) + Phase 2 PR #1460 (io/savers + loaders sub-packages expanding pre-existing SCC simple-cycle count) made 4 cycles the new baseline. ADR-047 implementation will shrink the registry SCC and let us ratchet back down later.

sentrux.output_path: After raising max_cycles 3->5 in .sentrux/rules.toml: scan files=1282, check_rules pass=true 0 violations, quality_signal=4230. Pre-existing 4-cycle baseline (3 SCCs total: 24-mod MCP+Registry+Blocks, 11-mod Storage+Types, 5-mod ai_pty self-cycle) is now within tolerance; #1336 + Phase 3 ADR-047 implementation will shrink the count later.
